concerns.location: plan.md:§ 5 Evaluation (FR‑006) – “evaluate against STRING high‑confidence interactions (combined score ≥ 700) computing AUROC/AUPRC”
concerns.text: The validation target (STRING high‑confidence interaction set) is not independent of the predictor because STRING’s combined scores incorporate co‑expression evidence, which is the same signal used to generate the predicted edges. Using this benchmark creates a circular validation: the model is being evaluated against a ground‑truth that partially derives from the very data (gene expression) it predicts from, inflating performance metrics and undermining the scientific claim that co‑expression alone recovers true PPIs.
